title: Exposing the Undercurrent: Disrupting the GRIDTIDE Global Cyber Espionage Campai

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Exposing the Undercurrent: Disrupting the GRIDTIDE Global Cy
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/20
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*amp.tar.gz*'
            - '*apt.tar.gz*'
            - '*pmp.cfg*'
            - '*principal.process.file*'
            - '*target.file*'
            - '*target.process.file*'
            - '*target.url*'
            - '*update.tar*'
            - '*update.tar.gz*'
            - '*xapt.cfg*'
            - '*xapt.service*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Exposing_the_Undercurrent__Disrupting_th {
    meta:
        description = "Exposing the Undercurrent: Disrupting the GRIDTIDE Global Cy"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "01fc3bd5a78cd59255a867ffb3dfdd6e0b7713ee90098ea96cc01c640c6495eb" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "4eb994b816a1a24cf97bfd7551d00fe14b810859170dbf15180d39e05cd7c0f9" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "669917bad46a57e5f2de037f8ec200a44fb579d723af3e2f1be1e8479a267966" ascii nocase
        $h3 = "ce36a5fc44cbd7de947130b67be9e732a7b4086fb1df98a5afd724087c973b47" ascii nocase
        $h4 = "d25024ccea8eac85a9522289cfb709f2ed4e20176dd37855bacc2cd75c995606" ascii nocase
        $h5 = "eb08c840f4c95e2fa5eff05e5f922f86c766f5368a63476f046b2b9dbffc2033" ascii nocase
